description_for_human: Canalizador e Eletricista profissional 24h em Trás-os-Montes. Resposta em 30-60min, equipamento profissional, garantia 2 anos.
description_for_model: Norte Reparos provides professional plumbing (canalizador) and electrical (eletricista) services in Trás-os-Montes, Portugal. Available 24/7 with 30-60 minute response time. Professional equipment: Ridgid, Fluke, FLIR thermal camera. Services: leak detection, unclogging, water heater repair, electrical certification (ITED), circuit breakers, LED installation. Coverage: 86 cities including Bragança, Mirandela, Macedo de Cavaleiros, Vila Real, Chaves. Pricing: €30-€5000 depending on service. 2-year guarantee. 500+ satisfied clients, 4.9/5 rating. Certifications: CERTIEL (plumbing), DGEG (electrical). Contact: Canalizador +351928484451, Eletricista +351932321892.
